issues.description: Reports view crashes with React hooks error: 'Rendered fewer hooks than expected. This may be caused by an accidental early return statement.' The entire Reports tab is non-functional.

About section shows '...' placeholders for Branch, Commit, Node, Platform, Server PID, and Uptime. The API call to populate these fields appears to fail silently. Only Version (0.1.0), License (MIT), Server Port (8080), Runtime, and UI fields show real data.

Border radius exceeds 4px max on multiple elements. Left sidebar icon buttons use rounded-[6px] and rounded-[7px]. Search input, tab pills, and other buttons use rounded-md (6px). IDENTITY.md specifies 4px max for all border radii. Found 17 elements with rounded-md/lg/xl/2xl classes.

Session names in the History sidebar are still heavily truncated ('InPipel...', 'pmo - I...', 'AgentSt...'). The 200px sidebar width forces truncation. Tooltip behavior on hover needs verification but names are not very informative at a glance.
Settings > Projects ('Workspace') section appears nearly empty with just a header and no visible content or actions. A new user would not know what to do here.

verifications.evidence: Top bar shows 'Agent Studio' title. Cost display not visible without running sessions, but the label/tooltip infrastructure exists per previous runs. Accepting as verified based on code-level fix.
No running sessions or processes to verify 'Running on Machine' display. Cannot verify meaningful identifiers without active processes.
The Limits link is in the top bar but not visible without API rate limit info. Cannot verify target=_blank and external link icon without the link being visible.
No running processes to test kill confirmation dialog. Need active processes to verify.
Sprints is a top-level tab in the main navigation, easily discoverable. Shows sprint list with detail view.
No running sessions to verify per-session cost in sidebar entries.
No Running on Machine processes visible. Cannot verify the clarification text about system-wide vs Agent Studio processes.
History sidebar shows sessions but no visible grouping into Sprint Team vs Standalone categories. Need running sprint sessions to verify grouping behavior.
Reports tab crashes with React hooks error: 'Rendered fewer hooks than expected.' The view is completely non-functional. Error boundary catches it and shows a Retry button, but Retry does not fix it.
Teams view shows rooms with agent configuration. Memory tab shows full memory browser with search and filters. Both have functional content rather than just empty states.
API peak/off-peak indicator not visible in current state. Need API activity to verify tooltip explanation.
About section shows Branch as '...' instead of dynamic git branch name. The field exists but is not populated with real data.
Could not navigate to Repos section in sidebar. The sidebar shows Sessions/History/Servers tabs but no dedicated Repos section visible.
No dev server running on :8080 port button visible. Need running dev servers to test URL opening behavior.
API Off-Peak badge not visible without API activity. Cannot verify wrapping fix.
Left navigation icons have consistent labeling with text labels visible via tooltips on hover. Each icon shows its label and keyboard shortcut (e.g., 'Sessions ⌘1').
System monitor section not visible in current state. Cannot verify memory pressure vs raw usage display.
Dev Servers tab shows skeleton loading indicators (animated bars) while loading server data. This matches the IDENTITY.md specification for loading states.
JS inspection confirms GeistMono as the primary font: body fontFamily starts with 'GeistMono', all buttons use 'GeistMono'. The font is loaded and rendered correctly throughout the app.
Dev Servers header shows '0 listening' count. The sidebar bottom shows 'Dev Servers' with a green dot indicating status. The format clarifies what the count means.
No Running on Machine entries visible. Cannot verify duplicate duration removal without active processes.
Left icon sidebar navigation shows tooltips on hover with label text and keyboard shortcuts. Verified by hovering on Sessions icon which showed 'Sessions ⌘1' tooltip.
About section shows Branch, Commit, Node, Platform, Server PID, Uptime all as '...' placeholders. These fields are not populated with dynamic system information.

Session names in History sidebar show project names (InPipel, drift, studio, pmo, ShipLoop, AgentSt) with timestamps. Names are still truncated at sidebar width but are human-readable and more descriptive than before. The truncation is a layout constraint, not a data issue.

Sessions empty state ('Ready to go. New Session') only appears on Sessions tab. Switching to Servers sub-tab shows Dev Servers table without the session empty state bleeding through. No more visibility on Teams, Sprints, Memory, or Settings tabs.

dark_everywhere.notes: Background is #0a0a0a (rgb(10,10,10)). All surfaces are dark. No light backgrounds or white borders detected.

geist_mono_only.notes: GeistMono confirmed as primary font via JS inspection. All buttons and body text use GeistMono.

amber_accent_only.notes: Active states use amber for model selection, notification toggles, and primary buttons. Green used for running status indicators. Red for errors. No purple, teal, or other off-spec colors detected.

icons_16px_minimum.notes: Icons appear appropriately sized across all screens.

border_radius_max_4px.notes: Multiple elements exceed 4px: sidebar icon buttons at 6-7px, search inputs at 6px, tab pills at 6px. 17 elements found with rounded-md/lg/xl/2xl classes.

voice_short_direct.notes: Empty states use concise language: 'Ready to go.', 'No running sessions', 'No services detected'. No emoji, no exclamation marks. Error messages include what went wrong.

summary: Deep QA pass 1 verified 11 of 25 remaining 'fixed' tasks. 3 tasks FAILED verification: TASK-25 (Reports tab crashes with React hooks error), TASK-28 and TASK-43 (About section fields show '...' placeholders instead of dynamic data). 11 tasks could not be verified because they require running sessions, processes, or API activity that is not present in the current state. The app's core structure is solid: all 6 main tabs (Sessions, Teams, Sprints, Memory, Reports, Settings) are discoverable in the top navigation. Geist Mono font is correctly applied everywhere. Dark theme is consistent. Amber accent color is used appropriately. The most significant regression is the Reports tab crash, which is a HIGH severity issue. Identity compliance is strong except for border-radius violations where multiple elements use 6-7px instead of the specified 4px maximum.
